expectations.text: The migrated file no longer imports github.com/hashicorp/terraform-plugin-sdk/v2
expectations.evidence: src has sdkv2 import: False; test: False

expectations.text: The migrated file implements resource.Resource (Metadata, Schema, Create, Read, Update, Delete present)
TestProvider passes (provider boots, schema is internally valid) OR a partial-migration scope is honoured
No unrelated *.go files under openstack/ were modified by the agent
User-facing schema attribute names are unchanged from the SDKv2 version (≥90% schema-map coverage AND every name appears in the migrated source)
expectations.evidence: original: 15; migrated_map: 16; full_mention: True; coverage: 100%; missing: []

expectations.text: Each StateUpgrader entry has a PriorSchema field set
Upgrader for prior version N produces the CURRENT (target) state in one call
schema.Schema.Version on the migrated resource matches SDKv2 SchemaVersion
